# MedRBench data placement

Use the official repository:

https://github.com/MAGIC-AI4Med/MedRBench

Place this file here before running the diagnostic-case arm:

`diagnosis_957_cases_with_rare_disease_491.json`

Original repo path:

`data/MedRBench/diagnosis_957_cases_with_rare_disease_491.json`

The study samples 200 diagnostic cases from this file.
